verses.7: Inna rabbaka huwa aAAlamu biman dalla AAan sabeelihi wahuwa aAAlamu bialmuhtadeena
verses.15: Itha tutla AAalayhi ayatuna qala asateeru alawwaleena
verses.17: Inna balawnahum kama balawna ashaba aljannati ith aqsamoo layasrimunnaha musbiheena
verses.19: Fatafa AAalayha taifun min rabbika wahum naimoona
verses.22: Ani ighdoo AAala harthikum in kuntum sarimeena
verses.24: An la yadkhulannaha alyawma AAalaykum miskeenun
verses.28: Qala awsatuhum alam aqul lakum lawla tusabbihoona
verses.29: Qaloo subhana rabbina inna kunna thalimeena
verses.31: Qaloo ya waylana inna kunna tagheena
verses.32: AAasa rabbuna an yubdilana khayran minha inna ila rabbina raghiboona
verses.33: Kathalika alAAathabu walaAAathabu alakhirati akbaru law kanoo yaAAlamoona
verses.34: Inna lilmuttaqeena AAinda rabbihim jannati alnnaAAeemi
verses.39: Am lakum aymanun AAalayna balighatun ila yawmi alqiyamati inna lakum lama tahkumoona
verses.41: Am lahum shurakao falyatoo bishurakaihim in kanoo sadiqeena
verses.42: Yawma yukshafu AAan saqin wayudAAawna ila alssujoodi fala yastateeAAoona
verses.43: KhashiAAatan absaruhum tarhaquhum thillatun waqad kanoo yudAAawna ila alssujoodi wahum salimoona
verses.44: Fatharnee waman yukaththibu bihatha alhadeethi sanastadrijuhum min haythu la yaAAlamoona
verses.46: Am tasaluhum ajran fahum min maghramin muthqaloona
verses.48: Faisbir lihukmi rabbika wala takun kasahibi alhooti ith nada wahuwa makthoomun
verses.49: Lawla an tadarakahu niAAmatun min rabbihi lanubitha bialAAarai wahuwa mathmoomun
verses.51: Wain yakadu allatheena kafaroo layuzliqoonaka biabsarihim lamma samiAAoo alththikra wayaqooloona innahu lamajnoonun
